name: BetterTouchTool
description: Customize input devices , trackpad, mouse, keyboard, Touch Bar, and more

extraction.notes: Standard Sparkle appcast feed hosted on folivora.ai. Also available via legacy domain: https://bettertouchtool.net/releases/appcast.xml (may redirect to folivora.ai).

changelog.notes: Release notes in <sparkle:releaseNotesLink> or <description> within appcast item.

notes: Paid app (one-time purchase with free trial). Very actively maintained by Andreas Hegenberg. Uses standard Sparkle appcast. Download filename pattern: 'btt_{version}.zip' with underscore separator. The download URL in the Sparkle enclosure may be the authoritative source; the pattern here is the most likely format.
